summary: Tested Admin Console new tabs (Support, Comms, System, Finance, Content Queue, Content). Fixed SelectItem empty value bug causing runtime errors. All 6 new tabs now render correctly with their respective dashboard components.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error - backend endpoint may not be fully implemented

fixed.issue: SelectItem with empty string value causing 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' runtime error
fixed.fix: Changed value='' to value='all' for status and priority filter SelectItems

fixed.issue: SelectItem with empty string value for content type filter
fixed.fix: Changed value='' to value='all' for content type filter SelectItem

fixed.issue: Duplicate code at end of file causing parsing error
fixed.fix: Removed duplicate export and closing tags

critical_code_review_comments: Backend support ticket endpoints return 500 - may need implementation or debugging
All admin dashboard components properly use data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 new admin tabs (Support, Comms, System, Finance, Content Queue, Content) are working. Fixed SelectItem empty value bug. Backend support ticket API returns 500 but frontend handles it gracefully.

tabs_tested.support: SUCCESS - AdminSupportDashboard loads with ticket metrics, search, filters
tabs_tested.communications: SUCCESS - AdminCommunicationsDashboard loads with announcements, templates, campaigns tabs
tabs_tested.system: SUCCESS - AdminSystemDashboard loads with CPU/Memory/Disk/Database metrics and background jobs
tabs_tested.finance: SUCCESS - AdminFinanceDashboard loads with refunds, payouts, failed payments, tax report tabs
tabs_tested.content-mod: SUCCESS - AdminContentModDashboard loads with content moderation queue
tabs_tested.content-mgmt: SUCCESS - AdminContentMgmtDashboard loads with featured, banners, SEO, API keys, changelog tabs
